creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Created attachment 256676
textproc/py-m2r: Deprecate port due to terminated upstream development

Changelog
=========

-   Deprecate textproc/py-m2r


Notes
=====

I do not expect to set a specific expiration date for this port as long as it and its dependencies continues to build successfully against versions of Python available in the ports tree and do not cause a nuisance.
